title: Nether Coal Mod
description: This adds Nether Coal from the BTA Mod!!
body:
This mod adds the Nether Coal ore from the Better than Adventure Mod! (Textures from ImXR24!)

It generates naturally in Nether Wastes, Crimson Forests & Warped forest's with the same-ish frequency as nether quartz ore.

Nether Coal is better than normal coal by **x2!!** So it can make _8_ torches!

![Tazzy with the nether coal.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b507b1eb50b8c9fda3c8de7da16038c90f1b14.png)
